run_summary.summary: Two actionable updates today. First: SOJOS isn't just waiting on brand approval anymore — Ruby replied after Liz submitted content and asked for a voiceover intro to be added. Ball is back in our court, needs to be done ASAP. Second and more urgent: Linkind SP6 Solar Pathway Lights deal just got the green light on concept (Apr 23) and the brand wants content submitted Monday or Tuesday (Apr 27–28). That's this weekend to film. $2,000 deal — don't let this slip now that you're this close.

suggestions.message: Concept APPROVED — brand wants content by Monday/Tuesday (Apr 27–28). You have the lights in hand since ~Apr 19. Film this weekend! $2,000 on the line. 🎬
Ruby loved the video but asked you to add a voiceover introducing the sunglasses and brand. Quick revision — knock it out today or tomorrow and resubmit so this doesn't stall. 🕶️

deals.next_action: Add voiceover intro to SOJOS video per Ruby's revision request, then resubmit
